fuel.name: Warp Fuel Core
fuel.desc: Plutonium derivative warp energy standard fuel matrix cell.

scrap.name: Alloy Hull Scrap
scrap.desc: Damaged hyper-frame steel suitable for ship repair or metal recycling trade.

salvage_beacon.name: Salvage Beacon
salvage_beacon.desc: Deploy after combat to signal salvage crews to wreck sites. Reward credits based on target ships destroyed.

ore.name: Siderite Crystals
ore.desc: Rare raw crystal formation. High market value at industrialized terminals.

food.name: Nutrient Packets
food.desc: Standardized biological space provisions for long-haul bridge crew.

contraband.name: Illegal Nanite Pod
contraband.desc: Black-market technology banned in alliance sectors. Sells high at Smuggler Hubs.

nanobots.name: Nanobot Injector
nanobots.desc: Active engineering injection system that quickly seals major hull ruptures.

shieldcore.name: Shielding Harmonizer
shieldcore.desc: Capacitor system to flash-charge dynamic tactical barrier defenses.

torpedo.name: HE Fusion Torpedo
torpedo.desc: Standard high-explosive heavy payload warhead. (+10 Bonus Damage)

torpedo_proton.name: Proton Torpedo
torpedo_proton.desc: High-density nuclear fission warhead. (+25 Bonus Damage)

torpedo_antimatter.name: Anti-Matter Torpedo
torpedo_antimatter.desc: Devastating anti-matter collision warhead. (+50 Bonus Damage)

orichalcum.name: Refined Orichalcum
orichalcum.desc: Ultra-hard dense metal alloy used in advanced military bulkheads.

plasma_gas.name: Purified Plasma Gas
plasma_gas.desc: Superheated pressurized gas. Vital fuel reactant for heavy starship beams.

noble_helium.name: Precious Helium-3 Gas
noble_helium.desc: Super-compressed volatile nuclear fusion fuel harvested from heavy gaseous atmospheres. Highly valuable, stacks up to 50.

neutronium.name: Neutronium Dust
neutronium.desc: Micro-scooped degenerate neutron star matter. Extremely heavy and highly valuable.

xenomorph_relic.name: Xenomorph Relic
xenomorph_relic.desc: Intricate geometric crystal pulsing with low-level bio-signals. Collectors buy this at spaceports.

dark_matter.name: Liquid Dark Matter
dark_matter.desc: Non-baryonic super-fluid captured from collapsed gravity singularities.

beacon.name: Navigational Beacon
beacon.desc: Compact orbital responder unit used to tag space coordinates and broadcast sub-space telemetry.

encrypted_drive.name: Encrypted Data Drive
encrypted_drive.desc: Damaged hyper-drive databank. Can be decrypted for massive reputation or values.

weapon_frame.name: Damaged Prototype Frame
weapon_frame.desc: Exotic chassis alloy template from a classified military prototype project.

helium_3.name: Helium-3 Fuel Gas
helium_3.desc: Clean thermonuclear fusion isotope harvested from gas giants.

hydroponics_fiber.name: Synthetic Algae Fiber
hydroponics_fiber.desc: Basic organic matter used in bio-reactors and synth-food synthesis.

titanium_plates.name: Hardened Titanium Sheets
titanium_plates.desc: Raw structural metal plating used to reinforce standard ship hulls.

superconductor.name: High-Temp Superconductor
superconductor.desc: Zero-resistance ceramic strands used for starship power transmission grid lines.

heavy_water.name: Deuterium Ice
heavy_water.desc: Enriched isotope water blocks vital for reactor coolant jacket shielding.

singularity_core.name: Micro-Singularity Core
singularity_core.desc: Gravitationally collapsed micro-shell. Vital for sub-space warp engine drives.

neural_gel.name: Bio-Neural Gel Matrix
neural_gel.desc: Organic computing fluid designed to speed up navigational matrix coordinate calculation.

antimatter_capsule.name: Concentrated Antimatter Capsule
antimatter_capsule.desc: Magnetic containment canister containing trace anti-protons. Highly volatile and precious.

stellar_ignition_spark.name: Stellar Core Ignition Spark
stellar_ignition_spark.desc: Active stellar ignition spark enclosed in a temporal stasis envelope. Prized by megacorporations.

chronos_dust.name: Chronometric Dust
chronos_dust.desc: Tachyon-infused dust particles capable of localized space-time frame manipulation.

keycard_hegemony.name: Hegemony Core Clearance Keycard
keycard_hegemony.desc: An encrypted military keycard that spoofs Hegemony identity networks, unlocking restricted faction products.

keycard_syndicate.name: Syndicate Decryption Keycard
keycard_syndicate.desc: A cloned security card that bypasses Syndicate lockouts, granting clearance as an insider.

keycard_cult.name: Void Cult Ritual Sigil
keycard_cult.desc: A dark magnetic insignia that fools Void Cult scanning towers, spoofing high-ranking devotion.

keycard_consortium.name: Consortium VIP Access Token
keycard_consortium.desc: A premium commerce ledger bypass token that spoofs Merchant Consortium loyalty points.

ore_astraea.name: Astraea Crystals
ore_astraea.desc: Shining celestial crystals infused with background void energy. Extremely valuable.

ore_pyrite.name: Pyrite Prisms
ore_pyrite.desc: Light-splitting mineral matrix with super-conducting metallic crystalline structures.

ore_ignis.name: Volatile Ignis Ore
ore_ignis.desc: Highly explosive raw mineral. Highly dangerous to harvest, but extremely valuable.

spirit_neutron_ale.name: Crafted Neutron Ale
spirit_neutron_ale.desc: Microgravity fermented spirit. Drink to increase Weapons Specialist damage (+15% for 5 jumps).

spirit_hyperdrive_tonic.name: Crafted Hyperdrive Tonic
spirit_hyperdrive_tonic.desc: Tachyon-purified dynamic tonic. Drink to increase Pilot Evasion (+20% for 6 jumps).

spirit_comet_nectar.name: Crafted Comet Nectar
spirit_comet_nectar.desc: Sweet comet-melt drink. Drink to increase Miner Mining Yield efficiency (+25% for 8 jumps).

spirit_antimatter_brew.name: Crafted Antimatter Brew
spirit_antimatter_brew.desc: Volatile containment beverage. Drink to increase FTL jump fuel savings (+15% for 4 jumps).

spirit_ion_shake.name: Crafted Ion Shield Shake
spirit_ion_shake.desc: Highly carbonated shield tonic. Drink to increase Operator Shield capacity (+20% for 5 jumps).

station_core.name: Deployable Station Core
station_core.desc: A massive modular seed-frame for deep space station assembly.
